data.title: C1 Fund Inc. (NYSE: CFND) invests in Ripple for enterprise blockchain technology in financial infrastructure.
data.description: C1 Fund Inc. (NYSE: CFND), a closed-end investment company based in Palo Alto, California, has disclosed its recent investment in Ripple. Ripple is a renowned global provider of enterprise blockchain technology with a focus on revolutionizing cross-border payments and financial infrastructure. The investment comes as C1 Fund continues to concentrate on late-stage digital assets and blockchain infrastructure. Ripple's platform is widely adopted by numerous financial institutions and enterprises worldwide, and its technology has the potential to significantly influence the global financial landscape.

data.title: Coinbase and Mastercard in talks to acquire BVNK, London fintech valued at billions, focusing on stablecoin tech.
data.description: Two separate companies are said to be in discussions to purchase BVNK, a fintech company located in London that specializes in developing stablecoin infrastructure.

data.title: Mustang Energy Corp. plans to transfer Ford Lake, Roughrider South, and Cigar Lake East projects to subsidiary. Spin-off for securityholders via statutory arrangement.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 9, 2025, Mustang Energy Corp. (CSE: MEC) revealed an arrangement agreement with Allied Strategic Resource Corp., a wholly-owned subsidiary. The agreement involves transferring rights to Ford Lake, Roughrider South, and Cigar East properties in Athabasca Basin, Saskatchewan, Canada. Mustang plans to conduct a Spin-Out, distributing Allied Shares to its securityholders on a pro rata basis. This arrangement will be executed under Part 9, Division 5 of the Business Corporations Act (British Columbia).

data.title: NVIDIA's Blackwell platform shines in InferenceMAX v1 benchmarks, boasting unmatched AI efficiency, promising high ROI for AI factories.
data.description: In the most recent InferenceMAX v1 benchmarks, NVIDIA's Blackwell platform demonstrated exceptional AI performance, highlighting its efficiency and potential for significant return on investment for AI factories. The results indicate that Blackwell outperforms competitors, underlining its prowess in AI technology.

data.title: Monero's 'Flourine Fermi' update bolsters privacy by targeting spy nodes linking user IPs to transactions.
data.description: The latest Monero update named 'Fluorine Fermi' has been rolled out to boost privacy within the network. This update primarily focuses on combating nodes that aim to establish connections between user IP addresses and their respective transactions. By implementing these changes, Monero strives to enhance security and privacy for its users.

data.title: Cryptocurrencies including Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin, XRP dip amid gov. shutdown uncertainty. BTC: -0.55% $121,833.80, ETH: -1.90% $4,389.97, XRP: -1.40% $2.81. Market showing signs of decreased "Greed" sentiment. BTC trading volume hits $71B, liquidations surge over $670M.
data.description: Cryptocurrency prices fell as investors reduced risk amid government shutdown. Bitcoin at $121,833.80 (-0.55%), Ethereum at $4,389.97 (-1.90%), XRP at $2.81 (-1.40%), Solana at $221.91 (-2.09%), Dogecoin at $0.2494 (-1.05%). Bitcoin dropped below $120,000 after peaking at $123,600, with a 13% increase in trading volume reaching $71 billion. ETFs tracking Bitcoin had a $57 million outflow. Ethereum fell below $4,500, resulting in $670 million liquidations, wiping over $500 million in long positions. Bitcoin's open interest rose 0.51%, indicating new short positions. Crypto Fear & Greed Index showed weakening "Greed" sentiment.
